name: Perfect Rice - Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the directions on the rice package for the proportion of rice to water.
- Up to 4 cups of raw rice can be prepared in the Crock-Pot, making 10 cups cooked.
2. Rub the inside of the Crock-Pot lightly with butter or margarine.
3. Pour in the rice, water, and salt.
4. Cover and cook on High for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
NOTE: When turned off, the Crock-Pot will keep the rice warm for serving for 2 to 3 hours!
To "cook all day" (Low: 8 to 10 hours), use 2 to 3 cups of long grain converted rice, 4 to 6 cups water or broth, and 2 tablespoons butter or margarine. Season with salt before serving.
